sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ETH whales uneasy as onchain, derivatives data reduce chance for rally to $4K
feed.summary: ETH investor sentiment wavers as onchain activity and bearish derivatives positioning leave whales unconvinced, reducing the odds for a rally to $4,000.

feed.title: Seven Restaurants, A Giant Showroom, And Collaborative Labs: Ford's New HQ Is Built To Attract AI And Software Talent - Ford Motor  ( NYSE:F )
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co ( NYSE:F ) is turning a major page in its history. For the first time since the Eisenhower era, the company is moving its headquarters-an effort designed not only to modernize its workspace but also to appeal to the tech and AI experts reshaping the auto industry.

feed.title: Chinese EV makers tipped to storm global top 10 carmakers by 2030, McKinsey says
feed.summary: Up to five Chinese vehicle assemblers, leveraging their technology and production advantages in building electric cars, are likely to make the list of the world's top 10 carmakers by 2030, disrupting the pecking order in the global automotive industry, according to global consultancy McKinsey.

feed.title: Exclusive | Regal Hotels to offer 160 free rooms for 2 weeks to help Tai Po victims
